description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a black contoured seat and a mesh backrest, designed for ergonomic comfort. The chair features a sturdy central support column that connects to a five-legged star base, each leg ending in a caster wheel for easy mobility. The seat and backrest are both slightly curved, providing lumbar support and a comfortable sitting experience. The backrest is made of a breathable mesh material, while the seat appears to be cushioned and covered in a durable synthetic fabric. There are no armrests, giving the chair a minimalist and space-saving profile. Visible adjustment mechanisms beneath the seat suggest customizable height and tilt functions.
description: A black, armless swivel chair with a mesh backrest, cushioned seat, and five-wheeled base for mobility. It features ergonomic contours and visible adjustment mechanisms.
description_view_0: Side view showing the contoured seat, mesh backrest, and visible adjustment knob beneath the seat.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full width of the mesh backrest and the symmetrical five-wheeled base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the seat profile, backrest support, and adjustment lever.
description_view_3: Front view showing the flat seat surface, mesh backrest, and absence of armrests.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical metal column with a telescoping mechanism for height adjustment, connecting the seat to the five-legged base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Rectangular, medium-height mesh backrest with a slight ergonomic curve and a solid plastic frame.
